title: After the Satsuki Sho: One Crown Down!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(Run... Run away from the old me! Away from who
I've been until now.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Don't think about anything. RAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And here comes Mejiro... Palmer?! Mejiro Palmer
is in the lead! And she finishes in first place!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer pushes herself to her limit and wins
the Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, wheeze... I won. It wasn't the most beautiful win, and all I did was run as fast as I could, but I still won.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Palmer...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Oh. Ryan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Congratulations on the win. Uh, how do I put
this...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
You seem different. More serious... Or actually,
it's more like you're scarier now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Scarier?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. When we were kids, I never saw you make a
grim face like the one you had on during the race.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But I think that change is why you could run so
well today in a huge race like this.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Yeah, maybe... But...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: (Sorry. I haven't changed at all.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(I just never showed my true self before. And now,
I've finally lifted my mask a little...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I'm back, Trainer! I'm the Satsuki Sho champion!
Somehow!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad I decided to enter this race. I decided for
myself I wanted to run and look what happened!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But I couldn't really change Ryan's view much. I
guess it's hard to convince people you aren't a
Goody Two-shoes.
choice_data_list: But you made her notice you, right?
But you made her notice you, right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I think I've changed a little in her eyes. She
at least thinks I'm pretty good now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I've gotta keep boosting my vibes even more until
they get through to everyone!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The image everyone has of Mejiro Palmer being a
good little kid comes from old, sepia-toned
memories from her childhood.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But she may have been able to change the hue of
that image today, even just a little bit, through
her hard-earned win.
